title: Slow Steamed Thai Doner Meat Wrap
description: A lazy Sunday Thai dish featuring doner meat and leaf wrap steam, this recipe is kosher friendly and perfect for a relaxing meal. The combination of yeasty and creamy flavors will transport your taste buds to the streets of Thailand.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together curry paste, coconut milk, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, yeast, and salt to make the marinade.
Add the sliced doner meat to the marinade and mix well to coat.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Prepare a steamer basket with lettuce leaves.
Place the marinated doner meat on the lettuce leaves in the steamer basket.
Steam the doner meat for 10 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve the doner meat in the lettuce leaves with additional curry sauce if desired.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or basil leaves if desired.
Steam the wraps for an additional 2 minutes to warm the lettuce leaves.
